summary: The video shows a snowy road with snowbanks on both sides. A white delivery truck passes by on the right side of the road, traveling parallel to the ego vehicle.

events_timeline.event: A white delivery truck travels alongside the road on the right side.

uncertainties: The timestamp in the video may not align perfectly with the frame timestamps.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between the vehicles.
